acceptance_criteria.text: Achieve the milestone described in the imported narrative (`tracking/milestones.md#M5`).
evidence: README.md, ROADMAP.md, and CHANGELOG.md updated to reflect current multi-cert content counts and fill-in / command-entry PBQs after item 216.
